goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'west'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'thursday' and should go to 'stevenage'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should 'leave after 17:15'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for '6 people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the west
Make sure you get entrance fee
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave on thursday and should go to stevenage
The train should depart from cambridge and should leave after 17:15
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 6 people
Make sure you get the reference number
